/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-soname,libcust_opapi.so -o libcust_opapi.so CMakeFiles/cust_opapi.dir/add_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cust_opapi.dir/__/autogen/aclnn_add_demo.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64  -L/models/share/userdata/cb/AscendFast/kernels/ascendc_ops/add_demo/AddDemo/build_out/op_kernel/kernel/library  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64:/models/share/userdata/cb/AscendFast/kernels/ascendc_ops/add_demo/AddDemo/build_out/op_kernel/kernel/library: -lregister -lnnopbase -lascendcl -lexe_graph -ltiling_api -lkernels
